name: TalentLMS API
what_it_does: TalentLMS REST API for corporate learning management, employee training, customer education, and partner training automation. Enables AI agents to manage user creation and course enrollment for automated training onboarding workflows, handle course completion tracking and progress monitoring for training analytics automation, access branch and sub-portal management for multi-tenant training delivery, retrieve assessment and quiz result management for training effectiveness measurement, manage gamification elements (badges, points, leaderboards) for engagement automation, handle SCORM/xAPI/CMI5 course content deployment for e-learning automation, access custom user field and metadata management for learner segmentation, retrieve certification and expiration tracking for compliance training renewal, manage instructor-led training (ILT) scheduling for blended learning workflow, and integrate TalentLMS with HRIS, Salesforce, Zendesk, Slack, and SSO providers via Zapier and native integrations.
use_cases: Onboarding employees from HR automation agents
Training customers from customer success agents
Certifying partners from channel training agents
not_for: Large enterprise LMS requiring on-premise deployment
best_when: An SMB to mid-market organization wanting AI agents to automate employee onboarding training, customer education, partner certification, and compliance training delivery through TalentLMS with multi-tenant branch management and simple API integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE TRAINING COMPLETION RECORD INTEGRITY: Automated TalentLMS completion records for OSHA, HIPAA, or other regulatory compliance training must capture individual completion with timestamp, course version, and assessment score; automated bulk completion marking without individual record integrity creates regulatory audit failure. GDPR EU LEARNER DATA AND ERASURE: Automated processing of EU employee or customer learner data in TalentLMS must support GDPR Article 17 erasure requests; automated retention of EU learner records beyond legitimate purpose without erasure capability creates GDPR violation. BRANCH TENANT ISOLATION IN MULTI-TENANT TRAINING: Automated TalentLMS branch API access must enforce tenant isolation; automated cross-branch data access (customer training from one branch viewing another branch's learner data) creates data privacy and contractual confidentiality breach. API KEY RATE LIMITING FOR SMB PLANS: TalentLMS API rate limits are enforced per API key and may be lower on SMB plans than enterprise; automated bulk enrollment workflows on SMB plans may hit rate limits; test rate limits against plan tier before production deployment.

auth.notes: TalentLMS uses API key authentication (Basic Auth with API key). REST API with JSON. Athens, Greece HQ (Epignosis S.A.). Founded 2012. Private (part of Epignosis learning tech group). 70,000+ businesses use TalentLMS globally. SMB and mid-market LMS with multi-tenant branch management. SCORM, xAPI, CMI5 support. Gamification with badges and points. Competes with Absorb LMS, Docebo, and LearnUpon for corporate LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 5 users; paid plans start at $69/month for 40 users
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($69/mo, 40 users) through Premium (custom pricing for large deployments); annual discount available
pricing.notes: Athens Greece. Private, Epignosis group. Founded 2012. 70,000+ SMB customers. Free plan (5 users) → tiered subscription. Very SMB-friendly pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API key rate limits per plan tier; bulk operations throttled; no official rate limit documentation for lower tiers

known_agent_gotchas: API KEY ONLY — NO GRANULAR SCOPE OR OAUTH: TalentLMS uses Basic Auth with API key (no OAuth); automated agents share a single API key with broad platform access; rotate API keys regularly and limit to read-only key where possible for reporting-only automations

NO WEBHOOKS — ALL EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: TalentLMS does not support native webhooks for course completion, enrollment, or certification events; automated training workflow requires scheduled polling for event detection; implement polling frequency appropriate to business SLA (e.g., hourly for compliance deadlines)

BRANCH ISOLATION IN MULTI-TENANT DEPLOYMENTS: TalentLMS multi-branch architecture for customer education or partner training must enforce per-branch API key isolation; automated cross-branch API access for a single key can expose learner data across tenant boundaries; use branch-specific API keys for multi-tenant automation

Rate limit undocumented for SMB plans — TalentLMS API rate limits are not fully documented for SMB plan tiers; automated bulk enrollment (100s of users) may hit throttling without clear error guidance; test bulk operation timing on target plan before production deployment

Completion status vs course progress distinction — TalentLMS API returns both course completion status and progress percentage; automated compliance reporting should use completion_status='completed' not progress=100%; partial-progress records can show 100% without formal completion trigger

GDPR learner erasure for EU customer education — automated EU customer training data in TalentLMS branch must support GDPR Article 17 erasure on customer account termination; automated retention of EU customer learner history beyond contract period without erasure creates GDPR violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Employee and customer learning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Employee learning and certification data.
